commands.name: git_status
commands.description: Show the working tree status

commands.name: git_log
commands.description: Show commit logs (hashes truncated, limited to 50 commits)

commands.name: git_diff
commands.description: Show changes between commits, working tree, etc.

commands.name: git_branch
commands.description: List, create, or delete branches

commands.name: git_show
commands.description: Show various types of objects (commits, tags, etc.)

commands.name: git_stash
commands.description: Stash the changes in a dirty working directory

commands.name: git_add
commands.description: Add file contents to the index

commands.name: git_commit
commands.description: Record changes to the repository

commands.name: git_push
commands.description: Update remote refs along with associated objects

commands.name: git_pull
commands.description: Fetch from and integrate with another repository or branch

commands.name: git_fetch
commands.description: Download objects and refs from another repository

commands.name: git_checkout
commands.description: Switch branches or restore working tree files

commands.name: git_merge
commands.description: Join two or more development histories together

commands.name: git_rebase
commands.description: Reapply commits on top of another base tip

commands.name: git_reset
commands.description: Reset current HEAD to the specified state

commands.name: git_remote
commands.description: Manage set of tracked repositories

commands.name: git_tag
commands.description: Create, list, delete or verify a tag object

commands.name: git_clone
commands.description: Clone a repository into a new directory

commands.name: git_init
commands.description: Create an empty Git repository or reinitialize an existing one

commands.name: git_cherry_pick
commands.description: Apply the changes introduced by some existing commits
